content.en:
Long Fei Dao Ancestor once asked the Killing Temple to assassinate a Dao Ancestor, so he knew a person from the Killing God Temple.

Fortunately, the high-ranking of the Killing God Temple was still alive, otherwise it would have been a bit difficult for him to find the Killing God Temple.

Feng family, secret room.

Long Fei Daozu took out a customer token from the Killing God Temple, opened the token, and a wisp of consciousness crossed time and space to a special space.

Immediately, he called out to the upper echelons of the Killing God Temple.

Soon, an illusory figure appeared, shrouded in darkness, and this was a consciousness space, and there was no way to know the identity of the other party.

"Hades, you're here!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor spoke.

"Long Fei Dao Ancestor, what are you looking for me?" asked Ming Kai.

"I want to ask the Killing Temple to kill someone!" Long Fei Dao Ancestor directly explained his intention.

"Who?"

Hell is very direct, not much nonsense.

"Ye Xingchen!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor said the name.

"Ye Xingchen?" said with a smile: "Is it Ye Xingchen, the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor of the Human Race?"

"That's right!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor nodded.

Shen was silent for a while, and then said: "Ye Xingchen is the supreme true ancestor, and the hope of becoming an invincible Dao Ancestor in the future is at least ninety percent, and his father Wanfa Dao Ancestor has greater potential, the price of killing Ye Xingchen is very high, in a word, 10,000 forbidden Dao stones or treasures of equivalent value, are you willing to pay?"

"What, 10,000 forbidden Dao stones, you are asking too much!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor was a little difficult to accept, such a price was too great, it simply shook the foundation of the Feng family.

Although a forbidden Dao stone vein was born in the Forbidden Mountain Range before, producing hundreds of thousands of forbidden Dao stones, and some forbidden treasures have even given birth to a small number of forbidden Dao stones one after another, the value of the forbidden Dao stone is still very huge, and its value has not fallen due to the continuous appearance of the forbidden Dao stone.

And the Feng family doesn't have a few forbidden dao stones, if they use other treasures instead of payment, I'm afraid they will have to empty more than half of the Feng family's treasure house.

Just for revenge, he needs to pay such a huge price, and he is a little reluctant.

"If you don't want to, then forget it, our Killing God Temple is not willing to take on such a task!"

Dark cold voice.

"I'll think about it!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

"I'll only give you three days to think about it, and I won't wait for it to expire!"

After saying that, he disappeared.

Long Fei Dao Ancestor's consciousness withdrew from this void space, and his consciousness returned to his body.

"Three days!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor sighed, discussed with the other Dao Ancestors of the Feng family, and started a meeting.

The meeting lasted two days and was decided by a vote.

With more than half of the votes, the Feng family decided to spend this wealth to ask the Killing God Temple to take action.

--------------------

Black Wind Mountain.

Ye Tian was originally in retreat and cultivating, but he received a summons from the Wind King, and he could only come to the Wind King's small realm.

"Wind King, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

"Your son is in trouble!" the Wind King began.

"What?"

Ye Tian frowned, and hurriedly asked again: "Is something wrong?"

"Someone is killing the God Temple and offering a reward for killing your son Ye Xingchen!" said the Wind King.

"Kill the Temple!"

Ye Tian knew that this force was a killer force, and the members were all relatively mysterious and came from one force after another.

Moreover, the Killing God Temple is very strong, although there is no invincible Dao Ancestor, but there are several supreme Dao Ancestors, which are comparable to the Eight Heavenly Forces.

However, the members of the Killing God Temple came from other forces and could not be rated as the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, so he was just an idle organization.

The reason why Black Wind Mountain is not rated as the Upper Triple Heaven Force is also similar, some members are from the Lower Triple Heaven Force, and they are bandits, so they are not evaluated for the power level.

Being targeted by the Killing Temple, Ye Xingchen is indeed very dangerous, unless he stays in Black Wind Mountain and doesn't go out.

But that's not realistic!

"Wind King, I heard that the killers of the Killing God Temple have made a natal oath not to leak mission news, it stands to reason that the assassination mission cannot be leaked, how do you know?" Ye Tian was a little curious.

"Hahaha, other killers naturally can't leak the news, otherwise who would dare to find the Killing Temple to issue a mission. But I'm different, let me tell you the truth, I'm one of the three deputy hall masters of the Killing God Temple!" said the Wind King with a smile.

"What, Wind King, you are the deputy hall master of the Killing God Temple!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This news was too surprising, he thought that the Wind King had sent him to infiltrate the Killing God Temple, and used a special way to deliver the news, but he didn't expect the Wind King to be directly one of the deputy hall masters of the Killing God Temple.

"The other ten kings of Black Wind Mountain all know this secret, and you are the Great Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain, and your status is second only to us, so you are naturally qualified to know this secret!"

The Wind King talked about why he became one of the deputy hall masters of the Killing God Temple.

Originally.

In order to make extra money, the Wind King level became the killer of Black Wind Mountain, and as his strength grew, he gradually became the deputy hall master of the Killing God Temple, and he had great power, but he didn't know who the hall master of the Killing God Temple was, and the other party was too mysterious.

"Wind King, do you know who issued the mission?"

Ye Tian asked.

He had a guess in his mind, but he wasn't sure for it.

"It's the Feng family!The Feng family in the Heavenly Emperor's Palace is also the family where the Emperor Fengyang belongs!" replied the Wind King.

"Sure enough, it's them!"

Ye Tian was furious.

"Wind King, what should I do now?" Ye Tian frowned.

"Let Ye Xingchen go out, attract the killer to assassinate Ye Xingchen, and then let the Fire King secretly protect, once there is a killer attack, the Fire King will immediately attack! The Killing Temple will not send a second killer, and they are also afraid that the Killing God Temple will be implicated." So, once a killer fails, the mission is tantamount to failure. And once the killer fails, he will either die or take the initiative to quit the Killing God Temple!"

The Wind King explained.

"I understand, then do what the Wind King wants!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Then, the Wind King also told Ye Xingchen about the matter.

Ye Xingchen didn't have any worries, but he didn't leave immediately, but waited for thousands of years before leaving the Black Wind Mountain and patrolling around the human race.

Ye Tian did not follow Ye Xingchen, otherwise it would be easy for the killer not to attack.

Through the information provided by the Wind King, there is indeed a killer who has taken over the task, and he is a silver-level killer with a strength at the level of the Sixth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor killed a Supreme True Ancestor, and this could almost certainly be accomplished.

This is also the reason why the success rate of assassination is almost more than ninety percent in the Killing God Temple, the strong kill the weak, and it is still an assassination, can the success rate not be high?

this day.

Ye Xingchen flew in a void.

Abruptly, the void froze, and a terrifying aura locked on him.

He knew that the killer of the Temple of Killing God had finally arrived!
